[UserLibraryRuntime](./ts-chocolate.userruntime.userlibraryruntime.md)


</td><td>

Implementation of user library runtime materialization.

Provides: - On-demand materialization of persisted sessions - Caching of materialized sessions - Creation and persistence of new sessions


</td></tr>

<tr><td>

[IUserLibraryRuntime](./ts-chocolate.userruntime.iuserlibraryruntime.md)


</td><td>

Runtime materialization layer for user library data.

This interface provides: - Materialization of persisted sessions into runtime editing sessions - Caching of materialized sessions for efficient access - Creation and persistence of new sessions


</td></tr>
